title: Senior Biostatistician
description: Support statistical design and analysis for Phase II/III clinical trials. Collaborate with clinical operations and regulatory teams.

title: Biostatistician II
description: Develop statistical analysis plans and perform analyses for oncology and mRNA vaccine trials.

title: Adjunct Lecturer, Biostatistics
description: Teach introductory biostatistics to MPH students on Tuesday evenings. Adjunct position, approximately 4 hours per week.
